---
title: "Kate Colvin"

output:
  html_document:
    css: style.css
    toc: false
---

<!-- NAVIGATION -->
<div class="navbar">
  <a href="#home">Home</a>
  <a href="#research">Research</a>
  <a href="#projects">Projects</a>
  <a href="#contact">Contact</a>
</div>

<div id="home"></div>

<!-- HERO -->
<div class="row" style="margin-top:40px; margin-bottom:50px;">

  <div class="col-md-4">
    <img src="images/kate_newer_square.jpg" style="width:100%; border-radius:6px;">
  </div>

  <div class="col-md-8">

    # Kate Colvin

    **PhD Student in Biostatistics**  
    Columbia University Mailman School of Public Health

    I am a third-year PhD student in Biostatistics at Columbia University. My research interests include clinical trial methodology, causal inference, mental health, and cancer. 
    
    Before beginning my PhD, I earned bachelor's degrees in Statistics and Public Health from UC Berkeley. I've done research at the Environmental Health Sciences Division at the UC Berkeley School of Public Health, the Biostatistics Department at University of Michican, and the Department of Epidemiology and Biostatistics at Memorial Sloan Kettering Cancer Center. 

    <br>

    <a class="button" href="cv.pdf">CV</a>
    <a class="button" href="https://github.com/kaaateco">GitHub</a>
    <a class="button" href="mailto:kac2301@cumc.columbia.edu">Email</a>

  </div>
</div>

---

<div id="research"></div>

## Research Interests & Education

<div class="row">

<div class="col-md-6">

### Research Interests

- Test

</div>

<div class="col-md-6">

### Education

**Columbia University**  
PhD in Biostatistics (2024–Present)

**University of California, Berkeley**  
BA Statistics & Public Health (2020–2024)

</div>
</div>

---

## Skills & Experience

<div class="row">

<div class="col-md-6">

### Skills

- R / RStudio  
- Python  

</div>

<div class="col-md-6">

### Experience

Research Assistant  
Teaching Assistant  
Internships / Projects  

</div>
</div>

---

<div id="projects"></div>

## Projects

### Interactive Dashboard
Short description...

### Data Visualization Work
Short description...

---

<div id="contact"></div>

## Contact

Kate Colvin <br>
[Department of Biostatistics](https://www.publichealth.columbia.edu/academics/departments/biostatistics) <br>
[Columbia Mailman School of Public Health](https://www.publichealth.columbia.edu/) <br>

Email: [kac2301@cumc.columbia.edu](mailto:<kac2301@cumc.columbia.edu>)
